cover_letter: hiring manager Tata Consultancy Services company address dear hiring manager i am excited to submit my application for the Business Analyst opportunity with Tata Consultancy Services. i am interested in this opportunity because the role's focus on bridging business needs with technical solutions within the financial services sector, particularly in compliance and audit, aligns perfectly with my career aspirations. what interests me about working for Tata Consultancy Services is its reputation for driving digital transformation and its commitment to employee growth through training and certification reimbursement excites inspires intrigues me because I am eager to leverage my technical background to contribute to impactful projects within a leading global IT services company. i believe my strong analytical abilities and my experience in stakeholder engagement would make me a strong candidate for this role. during my professional career i have approached problems with a focus on data-driven decision-making and clear communication. in fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed statistical models to identify high-value customer segments; targeted marketing initiatives informed by these models contributed to a 300% increase in revenue in the targeted segment over 12 months. this demonstrated my ability to translate complex data into significant business outcomes. ultimately i know that the Business Analyst role at Tata Consultancy Services would allow me to bring my data analysis and strategic thinking skills to gathering requirements and supporting compliance initiatives. additionally my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters Cleaning Services enabled me to develop my stakeholder management skills. I developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%, which required close collaboration with operational teams and leadership to ensure alignment and adoption. i’m excited by the opportunity to use my SQL proficiency and business analysis capabilities in working on financial services projects at Tata Consultancy Services. i know that my analytical acumen and my communication and presentation skills align with what it takes to succeed at the Business Analyst role. i would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. thank you for your time and consideration. i look forward to hearing from you soon. warm regards Justin Miller
